mapper.select: SELECT TV.WRITE_YEAR, TV.DOC_TYPE, TV.DOC_NO, TV.COMP_ID, TV.HR_ID, TV.ORGN_NM, TV.JBRP, TV.WORKING_AT, TV.HAS_CERTIFICATE, TV.ORD_SEQ, TV.USE_YN, TV.CREATED_AT, TV.CREATED_BY, TV.UPDATED_AT, TV.UPDATED_BY, TH.HR_NM FROM ESG.TB_VOLUNTARY_SAFETY_INSPECTOR TV INNER JOIN ESG.TB_HR_INFO TH ON TH.HR_ID = TV.HR_ID WHERE COMP_ID = #{compId} and write_year=#{writeYear} and doc_no=#{docNo} ORDER BY USE_YN DESC, ORD_SEQ
mapper.insert:
SELECT LPAD((COALESCE(MAX(DOC_NO::INTEGER), 0) + 1)::TEXT, 5, '0') AS DOC_NO, TO_CHAR(NOW(), 'YYYY') AS WRITE_YEAR FROM ESG.TB_VOLUNTARY_SAFETY_INSPECTOR WHERE TO_DATE(WRITE_YEAR,'YYYY') = DATE_TRUNC('YEAR',NOW())
INSERT INTO ESG.TB_VOLUNTARY_SAFETY_INSPECTOR ( WRITE_YEAR, DOC_TYPE, DOC_NO, COMP_ID, HR_ID, ORGN_NM, JBRP, WORKING_AT, HAS_CERTIFICATE, ORD_SEQ, CREATED_AT, CREATED_BY ) VALUES ( #{writeYear}, #{docType}, #{docNo}, #{compId}, #{hrId}, #{orgnNm}, #{jbrp}, #{workingAt}, #{hasCertifiCate}, #{ordSeq}, NOW(), #{createdBy} )
